Name: Health Crisis
Comments: IMF attack/Spike round, play on A5 to deny WC/MC this health
Text: sell up to 9 health to the State for 10V each.

Name: Higher education program
Comments: IMF attack/Spike round, play on A5 to deny WC/MC this education
Text: sell up to 9 education to the State for 10V each

Name: Bid rigging
Comments: IMF attack/Spike round
Text: sell up to 6 laxury to the state for 10V each.  Get 1 influance.

Name: Business grants
Comments: IMF attack/Spike round
Text: get 5V from State for each company you own

Name: Unemplyment initiative program
Text: assgin unemployed workers to one of your non-operational companies. get 5V from the State for each worker assign this way

Name: Industrialization
Comments: if it fits your plan its a free 12V, dont change your plans in order to use it.
Text: build a luxury or agricultural company paying half the cost, the other half is paid by State

Name: Business expansion
Text: build 2 companies then add 2 new companies to the market

Name: Investment opportunities
Comments: R1: buy the most expensive company with available workers / Automated
Text: build a company paying 10V less.  Or pay an extra 10V to build a company from the deck.

Name: Technological progress
Comments: Best on R1, good at R2.  Best on the three 8+3 companies
Text: buy 2 mechinary symbols for 45V or just one symbol for 20V

Name: Push political agenda
Text: pay 25V to propose 2 bills
Players:: Cards that will be seen in a game:

Name: Foreign market insight
Comments: Spike round
Text: choose 1 out of top 3 export cards, and make an export.

Name: Foreign recruitment
Comments: Attack: raise WC/MC population when their health/edu/lux is equal to their pop
Text: choose one non-operetional company. Spead 10V and assgin matching workers from supply

Name: Offshore companies
Comments: Spike round, redundant if low taxes 3C
Text: move half revenue to capital

Name: Radical reforms
Text: propose a bill.  You can move the marker 2 steps but can't call for immediate election.
Players:: Money colomn: Playing the card for the event, with maximum effect

Name: Competitive wages
Comments: play on A5, to prevent responce of WC/MC
Text: set wages in one of your non-operational companies to L3 then choose an operational public company of the same industry with the same number of workers. Assign those workers to your company

Name: Exit strategy
Comments: play on Spike round A5 or R5A5, after WC did not start a demonstation.
Text: sell a company without Mechinary for double its cost

Name: Endorse political campaign
Text: pay 15 to add 6 cubes to the bag

Name: Public opinion polling
Text: propose a bill. Then decide between immediate vote with 5 voting cubes that just revelead or returning the cubes to the bag and draw new ones in the election phase.

Name: Tax enough already!
Comments: Taxation(3) is super importatant to CC
Text: add 2 cubes to the bag, then propose a bill for Taxation (3)

Name: Tap into new markets
Comments: Foreign trade (6) is somewhat important to CC
Text: add 2 cubes to the bag, then propose a bill for foreign trade (6)

Name: Global food crisis
Comments: Export + sell 4 food for 15V each
Text: export + sell 4 food for 15V each

Name: Global branding
Comments: Export + sell 6 lux for 10V each
Text: export + sell 6 lux for 10V each

Name: Foreign partner
Comments: buisness deal + export(Food+Lux)
Text: make a business deal, then export Food and Luxury

Name: Fake news
Comments: situational: strong if only few cubes in the bag. Otherwise play it for the regular action
Text: draw 6 cubes, remove up to 4 of them.

Name: Interest groups
Comments: situational: strong if only few cubes in the bag. Otherwise play it for the regular action
Text: reaveal cubes from the bag until 3 of other clases, replace them with our cubes.

Name: Trade protectionism lobby
Text: 2 cubes * Agricultural company owned.  If 6A then (2 cubes) * (Agricultural & Luxury company owned)

Name: Extra shift
Comments: play on the turn before the spike round
Text: choose non-autometed company, pay wages and preform production

Name: Buy private island
Comments: play on R5, otherwise its only 7-4=3vp
Text: pay 50V to the State, get 7VP.
